subject: Removing http for DMaaP DR
commit_message:
Removing http for DMaaP DR

Signed-off-by: efiacor <fiachra.corcoran@est.tech>
Issue-ID: DMAAP-1400
Change-Id: Ifd0502283d4efe0c14aeb1e77bfa85779596cfec

entries.message:
